list.empty: No experiments yet. Create your first one!

create.title: New experiment
create.name: Name
create.descriptionPlaceholder: What are we testing and why

errors.minVariants: At least one variant is required
errors.baselineRange: Baseline conversion must be between 0 and 1.
errors.baselinePlusMde: baseline_rate + MDE > 1. Decrease one of the values.

results.title: Experiment results
results.noResultsHint: No results yet. Click 'Run analysis' to start.
results.srmWarning: User allocation has deviated from expected.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke key «{{name}}»? This action cannot be undone.
apiKeys.warning: Save this key — it will only be shown once

users.title: Users & roles
users.subtitle: Manage who has access and which permissions they hold
users.cannotToggleSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account
users.emptyDescription: Users will appear here once they register.
users.noAvailableRoles: All roles are already assigned to this user

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Append-only history of administrative actions
audit.emptyDescription: Administrative mutations (roles, users) will be logged here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Theme, language, and admin shortcuts
settings.adminHint: Administrative pages. Some require the admin role.
settings.apiKeysHint: Manage API keys for the SDK.

decisions.comingSoon: Decision log will appear here once M-012 lands.

sampleSize.title: Sample size calculator
sampleSize.subtitle: Pre-experiment power analysis. Conversion and continuous modes.
sampleSize.mdeHint: Absolute change you want to detect
sampleSize.meanHint: Current mean (e.g. avg revenue per user)
sampleSize.mdeAbsoluteHint: Absolute change you want to detect
sampleSize.dailyTrafficHint: Optional. Used to estimate days needed.
sampleSize.explanation: You need ~{{perVariant}} users per variant (total {{total}}) to detect a change from {{from}} to {{to}} with α={{alpha}} and power={{power}}.

review.title: Review
review.description: Double-check the experiment before creating it.

settings.title: Analysis settings
settings.sequentialHelp: Always-valid p-values — you can peek at results anytime without inflating the false positive rate. Best for long-running experiments where stopping the winner early matters.
settings.holdoutHelp: Holdout arrives in M-010 (Segments + Holdouts). Stub for now.

srm.title: Sample Ratio Mismatch detected
srm.description: User distribution across variants deviates from expected (p = {{pValue}}). Results cannot be trusted until the assignment pipeline is fixed.

power.title: Underpowered test
power.description: Current MDE = {{mde}} (~{{ratio}}% of baseline). The experiment cannot detect effects smaller than this. Wait for more samples.

sequential.chartHelp: Red line is α. When the always-valid p-value drops below it, you can safely stop the experiment (Howard et al. 2021).

guardrailViolated.title: Guardrail violated
guardrailViolated.description: A guardrail metric moved significantly in the wrong direction. The winner flag is suppressed even when the primary metric wins.

clearWinner.title: Clear winner
clearWinner.description: p < 0.01 and relative lift {{lift}}% — strong signal, safe to stop.

likelyWinner.title: Likely winner
likelyWinner.description: Effect is statistically significant, but the lift is small. Wait a bit longer to confirm.

underpowered.title: Underpowered
underpowered.description: MDE = {{achieved_mde}} exceeds half of the baseline. The test cannot detect a reasonable effect. Wait for more samples.

noSignificance.title: No significant effect yet
noSignificance.description: p = {{p_value}} > α, but the test has sensitivity. Continue collecting data.

sequentialBoundary.title: Sequential boundary crossed
sequentialBoundary.description: Always-valid p-value = {{sequential_fpr}} < α. Safe to stop — FPR is controlled at α for any number of peeks.

winner.title: Clear winner
winner.description: Strong signal detected (relative lift {{lift}}%). Results refreshed.

guardrail.title: Guardrail violated
guardrail.description: A guardrail metric moved significantly in the wrong direction.

boundary.title: Sequential boundary crossed
boundary.description: Always-valid p-value = {{sequential_fpr}} < α. Safe to stop.

flags.title: Feature flags
flags.subtitle: Kill switches and gradual rollouts. SDK clients read these on every request.
flags.newHelp: Flags are addressed by a stable key — e.g. "new_checkout". Pick something your SDK code can read literally.
flags.configHelp: Edit name, description, and rollout. The toggle flips the flag instantly.
flags.rulesDescription: Rules let you override the flag-level rollout for specific users. Segment targeting arrives in M-010.
flags.rulesHelp: Rules are evaluated in priority order (lowest first). Rules with no segment apply to everyone until segments arrive in M-010.
flags.rulesEmpty: No override rules yet. The flag-level rollout applies to every user.
flags.emptyDescription: Create your first flag to start toggling features without a deploy.

errors.keyFormat: Key must be lowercase, start with a letter or digit, and contain only letters, digits, hyphens, or underscores.

segments.title: Segments
segments.subtitle: Reusable targeting definitions. AND-combined matchers evaluated against user properties sent by the SDK.
segments.previewHelp: Dry-run against a hypothetical user_properties payload — same shape the SDK sends with flag evaluations.
segments.previewSaveFirst: Save the segment first to enable the live preview.
segments.deleteConfirm: Delete segment «{{name}}»? Linked rules will be detached.
segments.emptyDescription: Create your first segment to start targeting experiments and flags by user properties.
